ships.name: Disney Magic
ships.theme: Golden Age of Ocean Travel — classic Art Deco styling inspired by grand transatlantic liners
ships.signature_attraction: AquaDunk — a nearly vertical drop body slide that extends over the side of the ship

pool_deck.notes: Three pool areas spread across Deck 9 and 10; Goofy's Pool is the main family area, Mickey's Pool is the kids splash zone, Quiet Cove Pool is adults-only

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Marvel Super Hero Academy, Star Wars: Millennium Falcon (themed lab-style play space for ages 3–10)
kids_clubs.oceaneer_lab: Merged with Oceaneer Club on this ship; shared open-plan space
kids_clubs.edge: Club for tweens ages 11–14 with lounges, gaming, social activities
kids_clubs.vibe: Teen-only space ages 14–17 with music, movies, and social events

stage_shows: Twice Charmed: An Original Twist on the Cinderella Story

rotational_dining.name: Animator's Palate
rotational_dining.theme: Art and animation come to life; walls shift from black-and-white sketches to full colour during dinner

rotational_dining.name: Lumiere's
rotational_dining.theme: French-inspired fine dining; Beauty and the Beast décor with panoramic sea views

rotational_dining.name: Rapunzel's Royal Table
rotational_dining.theme: Tangled-inspired; live entertainment with Rapunzel and Flynn Rider characters

specialty_dining.name: Palo
specialty_dining.description: Adults-only (18+) Northern Italian restaurant with panoramic ocean views; additional charge applies

specialty_dining.name: Remy
specialty_dining.description: Adults-only (18+) French haute-cuisine experience inspired by Ratatouille; significant additional charge

onboard_activities: Wide World of Sports Deck (basketball, mini-golf, shuffleboard)
Pirates IN the Caribbean deck party
Trivia and game shows in the D Lounge

ships.name: Disney Wonder
ships.theme: Art Nouveau elegance — fluid organic lines inspired by early 20th-century ocean liners
ships.signature_attraction: AquaDunk — same nearly-vertical drop slide as sister ship Magic

pool_deck.notes: Goofy's Pool is the main family pool; Mickey's Pool is the kids splash area; Quiet Cove Pool is adults-only

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Andy's Room (Toy Story), Mickey and Minnie Captain's Deck (themed for ages 3–10)
kids_clubs.oceaneer_lab: Shared open-plan lab space with Oceaneer Club
kids_clubs.edge: Tweens 11–14; lounge style with activities and social spaces

rotational_dining.name: Animator's Palate

rotational_dining.name: Triton's
rotational_dining.theme: Under-the-sea elegance inspired by The Little Mermaid

rotational_dining.name: Tiana's Place
rotational_dining.theme: The Princess and the Frog — New Orleans jazz and bayou-inspired cuisine with live entertainment

specialty_dining.name: Palo
specialty_dining.description: Adults-only (18+) Northern Italian restaurant; additional charge applies

onboard_activities: Pirates IN the Caribbean deck party

ships.name: Disney Dream
ships.theme: Art Deco glamour — larger and grander than the Magic-class with a soaring atrium and golden accents
ships.signature_attraction: AquaDuck — first Disney Cruise Line watercoaster; a 765-ft tube coaster that extends over the ship's bow

pool_deck.notes: Donald's Pool is the main family pool; Nemo's Reef is an interactive water play area for young kids; Quiet Cove Pool is adults-only with whirlpools

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Star Wars: Jedi Training, Marvel Super Hero Academy, Pixar Play Zone — immersive themed rooms for ages 3–10
kids_clubs.oceaneer_lab: Separate open-plan STEM and creative activity space for ages 3–10
kids_clubs.vibe: Teen-only 14–17; private outdoor area, music, events

rotational_dining.name: Animator's Palate
rotational_dining.theme: Guests become part of an animated film during dinner in this show-stopping venue

rotational_dining.name: Enchanted Garden
rotational_dining.theme: Garden party at Versailles — décor transforms from day to night during the meal

rotational_dining.name: Royal Palace

ships.name: Disney Fantasy
ships.theme: Art Nouveau — sister ship to the Dream with softer organic styling and a sea-exploration motif
ships.signature_attraction: AquaDuck — same 765-ft watercoaster as the Dream, wrapping around the forward hull

pool_deck.notes: Donald's Pool main family pool; Nemo's Reef splash zone for young children; Quiet Cove adults-only pool with whirlpools

ships.name: Disney Wish
ships.theme: Fantasy and fairy tale — the ship is styled as a wish granted, with a grand staircase atrium inspired by Cinderella's enchanted world
ships.signature_attraction: AquaMouse — Disney Cruise Line's first Disney attraction at sea; a 760-ft story-driven water ride featuring Mickey and Minnie

pool_deck.notes: Three pools including Mickey and Friends Splash Zone for families; Luna, an adults-only rooftop pool; and the Quiet Cove adults-only pool area

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Worlds including Marvel Super Hero Academy, Star Wars: Path of the Jedi, Walt Disney Imagineering Lab, and Pixar Play Zone — for ages 3–10

kids_clubs.the_hideaway: Tween space ages 11–14 with gaming, crafts, and social areas
